scripts.dev: concurrently -n admin,post,api,main -c yellow,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:post" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:main"
scripts.build:api: npm run generate:prisma && npm --workspace @dikshant/types run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/api run build
scripts.build: npm --workspace @dikshant/ui run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/shared run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/types run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/admin-web run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/post-web run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/api run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @dikshant/admin-web run lint && npm --workspace @dikshant/post-web run lint
